programme.title: Daktari 223
programme.desc: Daktari 223

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The Harts look forward to lunch with Jennifers friend Marcie and her new spouse Adam Fowler who vanishes and is soon found dead Meanwhile two men who followed him out of the restaurant trail who they think is his wife Jennifer

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: The press paints Christines self-defense shooting of a Hispanic drug-dealer as being racially motivated

programme.title: Starsky 318
programme.desc: Starsky 318

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: When String and Dom agree to shoot some incidental film footage for a friendly rival they accidentally stumble across a reputed mobster hiding out in the desert with plans for a secret rendezvous with his compatriots The mobster sends his goons out to recover the film but when their friend ends up being killed over the footage they shot String and Dom work even harder to try to find out whats behind their friends murder even though a local detective isnt convinced about their findings

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A frustrated dreamer turns to the supernatural to achieve success using an ornate pipe to eliminate anyone who gets in his way

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Fuming over Froys departure Matt loses his temper on a dominatrix and her client and packs his bags to return to LA Down two repo men the pressure is on Ronnie and Carlos who interrupt a couple in the middle of their less-than-holy matrimony

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team returns from a successful mission in Vegas but theres trouble brewing within the crews ranks Ronnie and Carlos repo from a self-defense instructor who lets his students do his dirty work Matt and Froy confront a delinquent delivery man steeling flowers from graves and Lou and Carlos are left defenseless against gang members with blowtorches Can Lou still keep his cool in the high pressure repo business or will there be repercussions for Matt and Froy that no one saw coming

programme.title: Lawmen
programme.desc: While celebrating in an inebriated state a group of cattlemen inadvertently kill an old man in Bannock The righteous marshal of the town vows to punish them

programme.title: Munsters 118
programme.desc: Munsters 118

programme.title: Munsters 128
programme.desc: Munsters 128

programme.title: Addams Family 106
programme.desc: Addams Family 106

programme.title: Addams 206
programme.desc: Addams 206

programme.title: Real McCoys S01E33
programme.desc: Luke wants to modernize the farm but Grampa is against change

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa has his heart set on joining the towns volunteer fire department

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Eds having paternal feelings so he talks Wilbur into adopting a little pony as a son for him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed volunteers to be shot into outer space

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: In Mexico to buy a seed-bull Lucas and Mark McCain fall prey to bandits These bandits strip Lucas of his shirt hat and boots Then they tie him to a tree and leave him to die while they ride off with his kidnapped son

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark gets a job at the livery stable in North Fork Lucas is concerned that Mark will not get his home chores done on time

programme.title: Gunsmoke S10E03 Old Man
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S10E03 Old Man

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Bonanza

programme.title: West 320
programme.desc: West 320

programme.title: Howling V
programme.desc: A werewolf stalks an eclectic group of travellers on hand to attend the opening of a long-sealed European castle

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A prisoner George De La Pena is due for parole after serving time in prison only to be haunted by his past before his release Meanwhile the prison warden John Milford tests an illegal drug for his own personal gain

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Janet is married to a doctor whos married to his work She wants to live her life with passion danger and romance like Fuchsia Monroe a soap opera character she watches religiously When her television goes haywire her friend Louise convinces her to get cable With her husband unresponsive to her needs she begins a steamy affair with the cable guy

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Two con artist attempt to steal the fortune of a rich man they accidentally killed by creating a fake seance for his blind wife but not everything goes to plan

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Faded playwright Arthur Brown uses electronic equipment to record private chats of other people as inspiration for his work His subject Diane is having an affair with Carla Magnuson When Dianes husband finds out everyone is in danger

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Unethical psychiatrist Dr Peter Milne gets romantically involved with unstable Sara Kendal His manipulation of her mind and emotions makes her illness worsen When she cant tell dreams from reality he becomes her rages target

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: After approaching a convicted fugitive Nick is convinced of her innocence but must prove it before she is put to death

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan and Micki disguise themselves as monks to retrieve a mysterious pen kept in an ancient monastery

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Hogans operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for 1000000 in diamonds but can he be trusted

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer meets a family from N Carolina who have encountered truck problems en route to Oregon so Gomer puts them up in a blasting range cabin untill he has time to fix their truck

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan wins a million-dollar sweepstakes and is invited to the Howells country club After feeling lonely he issues IOUs to the others so they may also attend He quickly misplaces the winning ticket and they all get evicted

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professors data indicates that the island is sinking but the men dont want to break the news to the women who have the men in the middle of a landscaping project The Professor ends up hurting his back helping with a rock garden

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa trades a date with Flora for a hound dog

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The Farmers Association is having its fall dance and Grandpa doesnt want to take Flora MacMichael until Little Luke tells him about the box supper that Flora is bringing

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is working undercover on a ship trying to find the plans of a super-secret weapon

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max must retrieve some secret plans that are sewn into a dress according to a model

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJs truck is hijacked by three beautiful sisters They need BJs rig and his help in order to make a big moonshine run that will raise money for their ailing fathers operation

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur is all set to enjoy a weeks vacation relaxing at home but his plans are ruined when his overbearing Aunt Martha and her talking parrot unexpectedly drop by for a prolonged visit

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: While Mister Ed phones in racing tips to Pimlico Race Course the Posts and the Addisons play Find The Statue

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans efforts to help a German baroness to escape are thwarted by Klink who has arranged for the transfer of a British prisoner who is senior to Colonel Hogan

programme.title: Hogans Hereos
programme.desc: When a British commando unit is captured before they can blow up a crucial German ammo dump Hogan and his men attempt to finish the job

programme.title: Mchale 322
programme.desc: Mchale 322

programme.title: Mchale 230
programme.desc: Mchale 230

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Taylor accepts a summer job in Texas which doesnt make Daisy happy; Wood may have found a new quarterback; Herman books John Denver to give the commencement speech

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood and Ava are nervous as Molly shows interest in boys

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Dan is hired to be the escort and bodyguard of Princess Zara during her stay in Las Vegas But political problems follow her Fanatic Lucille tries to kill both Dan and Zara before she herself is shot dead in Zaras hotel room

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Max has met a lovely woman who seems to enjoy his company also -- but shes part of a theft ring that cleaned out the Harts

programme.title: Newhart - 707
programme.desc: Newhart - 707

programme.title: Newhart - 611
programme.desc: Newhart - 611

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A satellite bound for Mars lands on the island The castaways hope to use it to provide visual evidence to the world that they are still alive

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Teague asks Mitch and Ryan for help of the Knights Templar when they are faced with torture devices which are controlled with modern electronics by an Asian woman

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Carlos goes undercover at a frat house but when the party gets the best of him Sonia has to step in and fight the drunken mob And when Matt and Ronnie go after some wanna-be internet sensations they become the ROs ticket to fame in a violent potato launcher attack bound to go viral

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt is eager to work his way onto Sonias coveted airplane repo despite her adamancy against him

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: Fortress

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Old moonshine runners Uncle Jesse and Boss decide to settle who is better once and for all in a race in nearby Hatchapee County However both of them have to beware of Hatchapee County Sheriff Emmitt Loomis while Uncle Jesse should be doubly concerned about Boss scheme to switch water with moonshine

programme.title: Hercules 219
programme.desc: Hercules 219

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An Irish guide finds the possible burial location of Mael a Taelon that came to Earth 2000 years ago It is crucial for the Taelons to find his research material

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne does some unauthorized research on a new kind of grain that will grow in any climate The billionaire who invented wants to sell it to the world Thinking poorer countries will be given money by richer countries But the aliens have their own plans for the grain after placing a new deadly poison in the grain they take over the body of the billionaire who suddenly offers it free to the world

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A rock singer tries to run away from the consequences of the morbid overtones in the lyrics of his songs after two fans committ suicide to the suggestions therein

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Can Will escape the wrath of guardians to a lost Mayan temple within the swamp when he is forced to be an unwilling guide

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Koenig is transported to another world and another time Once there he finds that he has to choose between returning to his life and companions on the moon and the love of a beautiful girl

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is asked to winter in the north with a herd of cattle over the winter with two men until the owner returns One man quits and Cheyenne runs off the other one who is the foreman after he attacks a neighbors wife in her cabin

programme.title: Young 304
programme.desc: Young 304

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Two Gunsmoke writers teamed on this modern-day Western set at a rodeo in San Franciscos Cow Palace A bronc rider dies in what appears to be an accident A rodeo clown looks around the scene after the police leave and discovers the riders rope -- which was cut almost halfway through before it broke leaving the bronc free to throw him The police come back to investigate the scene and before long the chief suspect is also murdered in another accident

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The economy of the small African country of Ghalea is threatened by a mass counterfeiting scheme directed by Walter DuBruis one of the countrys richest financier

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The police are looking for a young fugitive who was dating the daughter of a Hungarian family that Dr Kimble is staying with As the police stake out their residence Dr Kimble discovers her father is also running from a crime he was accused of

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The sociopathic son of a neighbor recently returned from away stirs up serious trouble for the Barclays

programme.title: Solar Crisis
programme.desc: A huge Solar flare is predicted to fry Earth Astronauts must fly to the sun to drop a talking bomb Freddy at the right time so the flare will point somewhere else Giant IXL Corp CEO Teague thinks the flare wont happen and wants the mission to fail so he can buy the planet cheaply while the scare lasts

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: Godzilla Vs The Sea Monster
programme.desc: James Rolfe reviews the 1966 film Ebirah Horror of the Deep dubbed Godzilla vs the Sea Monster by him directed by Jun Fukuda It features a film in which Godzilla was added as a late addition He then battles a giant crab

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: The Scarlet and The Black
programme.desc: Vatican efforts led by Monsignor Hugh OFlaherty to save Allied POWs and downed Allied airmen as the Nazis invade Rome

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Filip Verlinden v. Ibrahim El Boustati

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.desc: Milan Paleš v. Mohamed Didouh

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The big dogs go at it, as heavyweight Mario “The Big Hurt” Rinaldi puts his stellar record on the line against the hard-working, hard-fighting and hard-living Mark Burch. Rinaldi has never lost, and Burch has been defeated just one, so neither man will give an inch.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: John Smith v. Ben Earl

programme.desc: Chael Sonnen has trained with Team Quest, alongside fighters like Matt Lindland and Randy Couture. Tim Credeur has kept busy fighting on the US navy jiu-jitsu and judo teams, and making some cash in bullpen fights in Tijuana.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Sam Franchi moved from Venezuela to Canada when he was 14 years old. His initial introduction to martial arts came first through Jiu Jitsu. He eventually made a complete transition to MMA. He is the Hard Knocks Flyweight Champion in the amateur division and hopes to keep a clean record while working his way professional division.

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The GoBots are forced into a grudging alliance to defeat a race of enormous metal-eating spiders

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Warlike insects invade the Earth thanks to Cy-Kills space rift but his plan backfires when the bugs prove too difficult to eradicate even for the Renegades

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: In search of a message from Audric Jayce lands on a planet protected by telepathic plants which keep the planet concealed Saw Boss makes a deal with a wicket wizard who has put a sleeping spell on the princess who controls the plants

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: By using a lock of Audrics hair Saw Boss creates a clone which tricks Jayce into a trap Gillian suspects the truth and convinces Jayce to leave the root behind as a precaution Jayce is captured and a clone of Jayce is sent back for the root

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Sly Rax disguises himself an aboriginal priest VENOM has a machine that causes a giant vortex which they use to kidnap the village people

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM terrorize military aircraft with a submarine that is equipped with an anti gravity force-field and a tractor ray

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Labyrinth of Death

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Blade and Darkon fight in a final battle to determine Earths future

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: During the Simon Belmont Awards the Poltergeist King says that Trevor Belmont who is Simon Belmonts grandfather is a coward which makes Simon worried until him and Captain N get advice from a wizard

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After playing a riddle game Captain N Princess Lana and Simon get a call from Mayor Squaresly that Tetris is in trouble so they go and check it out while the Puzzle King plans to rule Tetris

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is on holiday at the Winter Olympics where Dr Claw plans to sabotage the games by replacing the torch bearer Gadget also faces the MAD yodeler and a Yeti-like Snowbot
